title: SMPTiers
description: This project introduces a new way to determine SMP Tiers. A new utility plugin to help with tier testing.
body:
🏆 SMPTiers — Skill-Based Tier Testing for SMPs

Bring ranked PvP to your SMP with SMPTiers — a competitive plugin that lets players run official Tier Tests to earn ranks from F → S based on performance. 💪

Players can duel in first-to-3 matches, and the plugin automatically determines the tested player’s tier using round data like 🕒 match duration, 🛡️ armor durability, 🍎 golden apples left, and 🧪 XP bottles. Only A Tier or higher players can host tests!

Use commands like:


```
/tiertest <player> — start a test match
```



```
/settiertestkit — set the official tier test kit
```



```
/settier <player> <tier> — manually adjust tiers
```



```
/tierlist — view all tiers in a clean list
```



```
/smpreload — reload config instantly
```


All tiers and player lists are fully configurable in config.yml, making it perfect for competitive SMPs, PvP clans, or ranked community servers. ⚔️

⭐ Simple to set up, fun to use — turn your SMP into a true skill ladder with SMPTiers!
